description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Nighthawk/Test CI/CD that runs on pull requests and pushes to the main branch. The workflow has read permissions for repository contents and packages. It consists of three jobs: check, test, and release. The check job runs in a matrix with targets build and check_format. The test job runs in a matrix with targets asan, benchmark_with_own_binaries, test, test_gcc, and tsan, and depends on the check job. The release job depends on the test job and uses a reusable workflow with task set to docker.
